ogTitle: Piedmont vs Pigeon Ponds: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Piedmont and Pigeon Ponds.
heading: Piedmont vs Pigeon Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Piedmont, Victoria and Pigeon Ponds, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Piedmont has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pigeon Ponds (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Piedmont or Pigeon Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Piedmont has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Pigeon Ponds scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Piedmont scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Pigeon Ponds scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Piedmont or Pigeon Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Piedmont has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
